---
title: "Projection-to-Envelopes Solver for Constrained Optimization"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
year: 2026
venue: "In preparation"
status: "in-preparation"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "unsupervised solver"
  - "differentiable optimization"
  - "feasibility guarantees"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** In Preparation (2026)

This work explores label-free, feasibility-preserving solver modules for differentiable constrained optimization.
